purpose: Track whether PR-130 June data has both committed records and a reusable acquisition path, so future updates do not restart from scratch.

ready_for_next_update.remaining_work: Promote manual month extraction to a parameterized annual-calendar parser. Current route is recorded and repeatable, but not fully automated.

progress_not_ready_for_calendar.remaining_work: Find full-month state/territory official source routes for 2026-06-14 through 2026-06-30, then promote only after full month is verified.

progress_not_ready_for_calendar.current_coverage: 18 June 2026 official club-date rows. 15 rows are mappable with high confidence; 3 rows remain blocked.

blocked_rows.issue: Club confirmed, but fetched official text has not explicitly named Ascot Park / exact racecourse for the June rows.

progress_not_ready_for_calendar.remaining_work: Resolve the 3 blocked club-to-racecourse mappings before promoting to manual-june-2026-hrnz-harness.json.

important_findings: The current PR-130 gate validates source_url/parser/last_checked and committed coverage, but it does not prove full automation for every group.
manual-june-2026-*.json files are auto-merged by scripts/merge-pr-130-manual-june-records.mjs, so partial files must stay under progress-june-2026-* until full coverage is verified.
PR-131 must verify regeneration paths, especially for manual_month_route_ready groups.
Problematic/blocked mappings must be recorded as progress blockers and must not be hidden inside manual calendar inputs.
